nasb.text: He also made two pillars for the front of the house, thirty-five cubits high, and the capital on the top of each was five cubits.

esv.text: In front of the house he made two pillars thirty-five cubits high, with a capital of five cubits on the top of each.

cnv.text: 在殿的前面又做了兩根柱子，高十五公尺半，每根柱上面的柱頂，高兩公尺兩公寸。

ccb.text: 所罗门在殿前造了两根柱子，每根高八米，上面的柱冠高二点二五米。
